subject: Thank you HOTH XIII participants!
body:
Congratulations everyone! And a big round of applause to all the winning teams!

Thanks to everyone who participated and helped make HOTH XIII a success! We’re so glad to have had you all and we hope you’ve enjoyed your experience! Give yourself a pat on the back and a well-deserved rest.

Winning teams should expect to receive their prizes within the next few weeks. For anyone who missed the closing ceremony, here are the winning teams for all prize tracks:

- 1st Place: Focus Lock
- 2nd Place: orAIte
- 3rd Place: domain.cv
- Best AI: Inbox: Zero
- Best in Storytelling: Voices Around Us
- Best Beginner: IMPROV

Congratulations again to everyone who participated! We will be reaching out to all the winners to send their well-earned prizes!

Thank you everyone! Enjoy the rest of your week!

subject: Final stretch is here!
body:
Get ready for the final stretch hackers!

Hope everything is going well! SUBMISSIONS WILL BE DUE AT 9:00PM. Submission information can be found by going to the Submit page on this website. Only one team member has to make a submission on both the Devpost and the Google Form. PLEASE MAKE SURE YOU SUBMIT BOTH!

We are rooting for you, keep pushing through till the end!

subject: Vanta Info Session
body: Hey hackers! We're having our Vanta Info Session in the corner of the Palisades Room in a few minutes! Come talk to our Vanta representatives to learn more about the company and what they do!

subject: Alumni SWE Fireside Chat
body: Hello again hackers! Our long-awaited alumni SWE fireside chat will be happening in about 10 mins downstairs in the Venice Room! Come down and talk to our UCLA Hack alumni working in the industry and get raffle entries + plushies while you're at it!

subject: Lunch break!
body: Our dedicated lunch break is starting soon in the Palisades Room! Take a break, stretch your legs, stay hydrated, and grab a bite to eat!

subject: Opening ceremony starts soon!
body:
Hello hackers! The beginning of Hack on the Hill is coming! 

We’re kicking things off at our OPENING CEREMONY in 10 MINS in the Carnesale Commons Palisades Room! Excited to see everyone there and welcome you all to our 12-hour hackathon experience!

subject: Time to check in!
body:
Good morning HOTH XIII participants!

Check in has officially started at Carnesale Commons Palisades Room! We’re excited to see you here!

subject: Welcome to HOTH XIII!
body: Welcome to Hack on the Hill XIII! We're glad to have you, and excited to see what you'll build. HOTH XIII takes place TODAY, Sunday, March 1st, 2026. We'll be periodically updating these announcements with new information, so be sure to keep an eye out! Happy hacking! :)
